value.rationale: The page describes Auto-review and automatic approval reviews, where reviewed actions can carry a status such as "Reviewing, Approved, Denied, Aborted, or Timed out." However, there is no mention of an "Auto-review Denials picker" as a named offering or UI feature. "Denied" appears only as a status value, not as a picker control. The specific named offering in the claim is not described anywhere on the page.
